ASTROLUPINE-READ.title: Read
ASTROLUPINE-READ.description: The value of this card is additionally increased by the target Register's current level. This effect is unaffected by any debuffs.
ASTROLUPINE-WRITE.title: Write
ASTROLUPINE-WRITE.description: When this card is played, the target Register's level is set to this card's value.
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_REGISTER.title: Attack Register
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_REGISTER.description: Can be [Read] and [Written] to. The value affects certain cards.
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_REGISTER.title: Defense Register
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_REGISTER.description: Can be [Read] and [Written] to. The value affects certain cards.
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_REGISTER.title: Draw Register
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_REGISTER.description: Can be [Read] and [Written] to. The value affects certain cards.
ASTROLUPINE-TROJAN_HORSE_VIRUS.title: Trojan Horse Virus
ASTROLUPINE-TROJAN_HORSE_VIRUS.descripti: At the start of its turn, takes damage equal to the player's [Attack Register].
ASTROLUPINE-ZERO_DAY_EXPLOIT.title: Zero-day Exploit
ASTROLUPINE-AUTO_MAINTENANCE.title: Auto Maintenance
ASTROLUPINE-AUTO_MAINTENANCE.description: At the start of your turn, gain block equal to your current [Defense Register].
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_ACCUMULATOR.title: Attack Accumulator
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_ACCUMULATOR.descripti: At the start of your turn, increase your [Attack Register].
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_ACCUMULATOR.title: Defense Accumulator
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_ACCUMULATOR.descript: At the start of your turn, increase your [Defense Register].
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_OVERWRITE.title: Attack Overwrite
ASTROLUPINE-ATTACK_OVERWRITE.description: At the start of your next turn, set your [Attack Register] to a specific value.
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_OVERWRITE.title: Defense Overwrite
ASTROLUPINE-DEFENSE_OVERWRITE.descriptio: At the start of your next turn, set your [Defense Register] to a specific value.
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_OVERWRITE.title: Draw Overwrite
ASTROLUPINE-DRAW_OVERWRITE.description: At the start of your next turn, set your [Draw Register] to a specific value.
